footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for all home services. Connecting you with verified professionals for quick and reliable solutions.

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.no_bookings_match: No bookings match the selected filters.
bookings.refund_processing_toast: Your refund will be sent within 2 days.
bookings.rework_processing_toast: Rework request submitted! The provider will be notified.
bookings.resolution_failed_toast: Failed to set resolution. Please try again.
bookings.not_accepted_message: No provider was available before your scheduled time. You can book this service again.

provider.job_request_can_still_accept: You can still accept this booking.
provider.decline_request_confirm: Decline for now? This request stays on your list until the scheduled time passes or another provider accepts. You can still accept it later.

profile.save_success: Profile updated. Your changes have been saved.
profile.save_failed: Failed to save changes. Please check your input.
profile.save_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

booking_form.time_buffer_hint: You can only book slots at least 1 hour from now.
booking_form.invalid_time_slot: The selected time is no longer available. Please choose another slot.
booking_form.insurance_note: Note: Extra 1% insurance fee will be added to the total.

categories.category_electrical_repairing_desc: Expert electrical repairs, wiring, and installations for a safe and functional home.
categories.category_carpentry_desc: Professional woodworking, furniture repair, and custom carpentry solutions for your home.
categories.category_cleaning_desc: Comprehensive home cleaning services, from regular maintenance to deep sanitization.
categories.category_gardening_desc: Expert lawn care, landscaping, and plant maintenance to keep your garden beautiful.
categories.category_painting_desc: Quality interior and exterior painting services to refresh and protect your home's surfaces.
categories.category_plumbing_desc: Reliable plumbing repairs, leak detection, and fixture installations by skilled professionals.

service_names.service_regular_house_cleaning_desc: Professional home cleaning for daily maintenance, including dusting, sweeping, and mopping.
service_names.service_deep_home_cleaning_desc: Intensive cleaning for every corner of your home, ideal for seasonal refreshing or move-ins.
service_names.service_sofa_cleaning_desc: Deep extraction and stain removal for sofas and upholstery using eco-friendly products.
service_names.service_water_tank_cleaning_desc: Complete sanitization of overhead and underground water tanks to ensure safe water storage.
service_names.service_pipe_leak_repair_desc: Fast and reliable repair of leaking pipes and joints to prevent water damage.
service_names.service_paint_touch_up_spot_repair_desc: Paint Touch-Up & Spot Repair - Professional service.
service_names.service_exterior_house_painting_service_: Exterior House Painting Service - Professional service.

notifications.no_notifications_desc: We'll notify you when something important happens regarding your bookings.
notifications.new_booking_request_message: You have a new booking request from {{customer_name}} for {{service_name_key}}.
notifications.new_job_available_message: A new request for {{service_name_key}} is available in {{category_name_key}}.
notifications.booking_accepted_message: Your provider {{provider_name}} has accepted the booking for {{service_name_key}}.
notifications.service_started_message: The provider has started working on your booking for {{service_name_key}}.
notifications.service_completed_message: Your booking for {{service_name_key}} has been marked as completed. Please review and pay.
notifications.payment_successful_cash_message: Your cash payment for {{service_name_key}} has been received.
notifications.payment_received_khalti_message: Payment of Rs. {{amount}} received via Khalti for {{service_name_key}}.
notifications.payment_successful_khalti_message: Your Khalti payment for {{service_name_key}} was successful.
notifications.insurance_refund_initiated_message: Your refund for Booking #{{booking_id}} ({{service_name_key}}) will be sent within 3 days.
notifications.insurance_rework_started_message: Your rework request for Booking #{{booking_id}} has been accepted. The original provider will contact you soon.
notifications.insurance_rework_assigned_message: A rework has been assigned to you for Booking #{{booking_id}}. Please check your active jobs.

about.hero_subtitle: Connecting communities with trusted service providers across Nepal.
about.who_desc: We make it effortless to find and book trusted local service providers. Our platform brings transparency, reliability, and speed to everyday services.
about.pillar_connect_desc: Match with verified professionals for your needs in minutes.
about.pillar_book_desc: Easy scheduling with clear pricing and flexible payment options.
about.pillar_relax_desc: Reliable service delivery backed by support when you need it.
about.diff_verified_desc: All service providers undergo thorough background checks and verification processes.
about.diff_support_desc: Round-the-clock customer support to assist you whenever you need help.
about.diff_quality_desc: We ensure high-quality services with satisfaction guarantees and easy refunds.
about.diff_pricing_desc: No hidden fees. Clear, upfront pricing for all services with multiple payment options.

contact.hero_subtitle: We’re always here to assist you. Connect with us anytime!
contact.subject: Subject *
contact.toast_success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
contact.toast_error: Failed to send message. Please try again later.
contact.faq_1_q: How do I book a service?
contact.faq_1_a: You can book a service by browsing our services page, selecting the service you need, and clicking "Book Now"...
contact.faq_2_a: All service providers on SewaSaathi undergo a thorough verification process including background checks...
contact.faq_3_q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq_3_a: We accept eSewa, bank transfers, and cash on delivery (COD).
contact.faq_4_a: Yes, up to 24 hours before the scheduled service.
contact.faq_5_a: Contact support within 48 hours for assistance or refund.
contact.faq_6_q: How do I become a provider?
contact.faq_6_a: Click "Become a Provider" in the header and fill out the form.
